hooks.command: node /Users/mzj/Desktop/healthy-recipes/scripts/notify-tg.js "✅ Claude Code 执行完成"

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'requirements'; then MSG="📋 P1 需求分析完成: $FILE"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'design'; then MSG="🎨 P2 技术设计完成: $FILE"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'tasks'; then MSG="📝 P3 任务拆解完成: $FILE"; else MSG=""; fi; [ -n "$MSG" ] && node /Users/mzj/Desktop/healthy-recipes/scripts/notify-tg.js "$MSG"
